title: Automation to create due date or deadline based on date IN item description
excerpt: Add automation to create due date based on due date in item description.  (i.e. Project kickoff meeting January 31, 2024).  The due date column will automatically convert to January 31, 2024.

posts.author: harima (AMIRAH SCARBOROUGH)
posts.cookedHtml: Add automation to create due date based on due date in item description. (i.e. Project kickoff meeting January 31, 2024). The due date column will automatically convert to January 31, 2024.
